name: Creamy Garlic Tofu Dressing or Dip
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Tofu, firm or soft; patted dry
4 tablespoons Water (use only 2 for the dip or spread)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all of the ingredients in a blender or food processor.
2. Puree until very smooth.
3. Use more or less garlic depending on your taste.
4. If too thick for salad dressing, add a little more water until desired consistency is reached.
5. May be kept covered in the refrigerator for up to 4 days.
